question: Give the title of book by George Orwell that has the lowest saleprice.
sql: SELECT Title FROM Book WHERE Author = 'George Orwell' ORDER BY SalePrice ASC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 获取特定作者的书籍标题，并按售价升序排列取第一条

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求获取George Orwell著作中售价最低的书籍标题，SQL描述通过过滤作者、按售价升序排序并限制一条记录实现了该需求。
